notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes a public hostage standoff scene. Most events (Fang Yuan kidnapping Bai Hua and Bai Sheng, clan leader releasing Tie Daoku, three elders appearing) are publicly visible events, not hidden knowledge. The only potentially hidden element is Tie Daoku's suspicion that Fang Yuan and Bai Ning Bing caused Tie Aotian's death, but this is presented as his subjective suspicion/accusation ('怀疑'), not a narrator-level fact. No source directly supports any character knowing a private fact that others don't, nor any future-known information or directly supported knowledge gap. Cannot extract a clean hidden fact without asserting subjective judgment or speculation.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed shows observable actions (百家族长释放铁刀苦, 方源挟持少主, 方源寻找隐藏洞口) but the motives behind these actions are ambiguous from the seed facts alone. 百家族长释放铁刀苦 could be to de-escalate or to buy time; 方源挟持少主 could be for escape leverage or other reasons. No direct source supports a specific inferred motive without psychological leap.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

百家（Bai clan）is a named collective faction in the seed. The clan leader (百家族长) and three elders (三位家老) are present. Two clan heirs (百花, 百生) are being held hostage by Fang Yuan and Bai Ningbing. This creates a clear faction-level pressure: the Bai clan's heirs are under direct threat, forcing the clan to react. The seed directly ties the clan leader and elders to the hostage situation. likelyReactions are conservative one-step simulation candidates (negotiate, track, rescue) without specific operations.
IF export filter quarantined 6 legacy old-schema branches.
Faction pressure subject filter quarantined 1 pressure candidates under policy reviewable.
